items.title: The features grid shows a "Checklist mode" card
items.hint: Scroll to "Everything a feedback loop needs"

items.title: The agent story mentions generating a checklist from a branch
A second round button appears above the Feedback button
items.hint: It shows a progress count like 0/3

items.title: Opening it shows the checklist; Pass / Fail / Skip each record
Marking an item Fail opens the normal report flow and links the issue back
items.hint: The item then shows an issue number
